      HintName: MixedMembers.g.cs,

// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class MixedMembers
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Determines whether this MixedMembers is equal to another based on their values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override bool EqualsCore(MixedMembers other)
        {
            if (!EqualityComparer<string>.Default.Equals(Property, other.Property)) return false;
            if (!_field.Equals(other._field)) return false;
            return true;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a hash code for this value object's values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override int GetHashCodeCore()
        {
            var hashCode = new HashCode();

            hashCode.Add(Property);
            hashCode.Add(_field);

            return hashCode.ToHashCode();
        }

    }
}

    }
  ]
}
